---
title: "Intervention Analysis"
date: 5/31/2024
categories: ["insights", "python"]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Data Visualization in the Field

Provide some context or introduction here...

::: {.observable}
<!-- // Observable notebook embed code or link here -->
:::


## Analysis
Include any specific figures or outputs from the notebook:


```{python}
import numpy as np
```



## Telling The Story
Include the Datawrapper iframe here:
<!-- <iframe title="KPI Dashboard" aria-label="Dashboard" src="https://datawrapper.dwcdn.net/chartID/1/" scrolling="no" frameborder="0" style="width: 0; min-width: 100% !important; border: none;" height="400"></iframe> -->
